title: OnePA CC Courses
text:
OnePA CC Courses - SupportGoWhere
OnePA CC Courses
Share link
Provide opportunities for residents to pick up new skills and interests through courses offered at Community Centres/Clubs (CCs) and Residents’ Networks (RNs).
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Dive into lifelong learning with PA's array of courses, from technical skills to languages
Enhance your well-being with health and wellness tips, including grooming, makeup, skincare, and body care advice
Embrace your interests and passions with lifestyle and leisure courses, exploring arts, crafts, cooking, and creativity
Keep fit with our wide range of sports and dance fitness courses
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Diverse range of courses at Community Centres/Clubs (CCs) and Residents’ Networks (RNs) covering everything from personal growth to interest development in areas like enrichment, health, hobbies, and fitness

Industry Guru Series: Tailored networking and deep dive learning opportunities to prepare you for the evolving job market

SkillsFuture@PA: Enhance your skills and knowledge by utilising your SkillsFuture Credit (SFC) for courses at CCs

PA SHIOK Series: Customised courses and programmes by the People’s Association (PA) Malay Activity Executive Committees Council (MESRA) and Malay Muslim Organizations (MMOs)

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens, Permanent Residents and Non-Singapore Citizens / Foreigners

How to apply?

To sign up for People's Association (PA) courses, you can:

Visit OnePA to browse and register for courses by logging in with your SingPass account

Visit your nearest CC to register at the counter

Where can I find help?

View more details

PA Contact Centre’s Hotline: 6225 5322

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest Community Centre/Club (CC)

Scheme last updated 09 Dec 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
